offer: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed renewal reminders cause supplier penalties. We provide reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract expiration dates and renewal reminders leads to missed opportunities and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where amazon sellers seek help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 amazon sellers with a demo video
Community forums/groups where amazon sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try storing contract terms and setting alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
